options.marker: , [Each Purchaser at the Initial Closing shall be obligated to purchase that number of Tranche Closing Shares (as defined below) as is set forth opposite such Purchaser's name on Exhibit A under the heading "Tranche Closing Shares" (as to any Purchaser, its "Tranche Closing Shares"), as provided in Section [1.2(c)] below.]
